search.query: source="parsed_auth_events.csv" event="FAILED_LOGIN" | stats count as failed_attempts by src_ip | where failed_attempts>=7 | stats count as high_severity_ips

panel.title: Failed Login Attempts by IP & Severity

search.query: source="parsed_auth_events.csv" event="FAILED_LOGIN" | stats count as failed_attempts by src_ip | eval severity=case( failed_attempts>=7, "High", failed_attempts>=5, "Medium", 1=1, "Low") | sort - failed_attempts

ul.li: La IP 192.168.1.50 concentra el mayor volumen de intentos fallidos (7), superando el umbral de severidad High.
1 de las 4 IPs analizadas (25%) requiere revisión inmediata por posible actividad de fuerza bruta.
Recomendación: aplicar bloqueo temporal o revisión manual a IPs con severidad High antes de que deriven en un acceso comprometido exitoso.
